name: Cypress Hills
description: Come play pickleball at Cypress Hills in Greenville, MS! There are 10 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to lights, a pro shop or equipment store, restrooms, water, and food. The courts can be reserved. A membership is required to play.

name: Hodding Carter Memorial YMCA
description: Membership packages/fees and court availability are available upon request by calling: (662) 335-7258. Scheduling changes due to pickleball leagues and basketball season and games.
fees: Members only — Membership plans available and required
